_meta.description: Catalst v7 Batch 2 — rich Hinge-card data for the 15 core journey industries. Merges into content/industries.json via scripts/merge-hinge-data.js. Each industry has 8 hinge prompts (card shows 3 per view), sub-category CAGRs, cultural trends, recent headlines, AI disruption angle, India-specific leaders.

ai_ml.tagline: The picks and shovels of every other industry
ai_ml.ai_disruption_angle: Every knowledge-work flow — legal, medical, financial, engineering — is being rebuilt at 10x speed, 90% lower cost. The moat is vertical depth and distribution, not the model.
ai_ml.cultural_trend: Every B2B SaaS is now a 'wrapper' until proven otherwise
ai_ml.recent_headline: Cursor hits $9B valuation as Claude 4.7 agents ship in production for Fortune 500
ai_ml.investor_sentiment_short: $45B deployed globally in Q1 2026 — 3x YoY. Late-stage AI tooling has never been hotter.

hinge_prompts.label: MY BIGGEST FLEX
hinge_prompts.text: $200B market, 36% CAGR, and no vertical leader has locked in yet

hinge_prompts.label: GREEN FLAG
hinge_prompts.text: You've shipped something with an LLM API this month

hinge_prompts.label: LOOKING FOR
hinge_prompts.text: Vertical depth, not horizontal breadth — narrow beats broad here

hinge_prompts.label: HONEST TRUTH
hinge_prompts.text: Your moat isn't the model. It's distribution, workflow integration, and domain data

hinge_prompts.label: FUN FACT
hinge_prompts.text: India's AI funding doubled in 2025 — Sarvam and Krutrim raised on tokenizer IP alone

hinge_prompts.label: TOGETHER WE COULD
hinge_prompts.text: Rebuild a legacy workflow — tax filing, radiology reads, contract review — at 10x speed

hinge_prompts.label: MY CONTROVERSIAL TAKE
hinge_prompts.text: AGI is a distraction. 90% of the value is in boring, specific, well-scoped automation

hinge_prompts.label: I'LL WIN YOU OVER
hinge_prompts.text: When you see the margin on a well-scoped vertical AI tool — 80%+ gross, often solo-profitable

ai_ml.user_behavior_shift: Developers now reach for an LLM API before writing a for-loop. AI-native has overtaken AI-assisted.
ai_ml.impact_potential: Verticalized AI tools hit $100M+ ARR in under 3 years. Margins 80%+.
ai_ml.india_scene: India's AI funding doubled in 2025 — Sarvam and Krutrim raised on tokenizer IP alone.

subcategory_shares.name: AI agents
subcategory_shares.description: Autonomous workflows replacing SaaS point tools. The hottest $40B segment.

subcategory_shares.name: Vertical AI
subcategory_shares.description: Deep domain AI for healthcare, legal, finance. Distribution is the moat.

subcategory_shares.name: Dev tools
subcategory_shares.description: Cursor/Cognition-style AI-native IDEs. Developers pick the winners.

subcategory_shares.name: RAG infra
subcategory_shares.description: Retrieval and memory layers. Picks and shovels for AI apps.

subcategory_shares.name: On-device
subcategory_shares.description: Edge models under 3B params. Latency and privacy unlocks.

health_wellness.tagline: Where longevity meets AI meets GLP-1
health_wellness.ai_disruption_angle: AI triage and continuous remote monitoring will absorb 60% of primary care visits by 2030. The winners own the data pipeline, not the devices.
health_wellness.cultural_trend: Ozempic reframed obesity as a solvable biology problem, not a willpower one
health_wellness.recent_headline: Hims & Hers quietly becomes a $12B GLP-1 distribution company
health_wellness.investor_sentiment_short: Longevity-specific funds raised $8B in 2025. GLP-1 adjacency is the new fintech.

hinge_prompts.label: MY BIGGEST FLEX
hinge_prompts.text: $330B global market. Aging demographics everywhere. This one doesn't go away.

hinge_prompts.label: GREEN FLAG
hinge_prompts.text: You've actually used a wearable for 90 straight days and have opinions

hinge_prompts.label: LOOKING FOR
hinge_prompts.text: Founders who see obesity, sleep, and mental health as biological — not moral — problems

hinge_prompts.label: HONEST TRUTH
hinge_prompts.text: Regulation is the moat. The winners learn the FDA game early, not late

hinge_prompts.label: FUN FACT
hinge_prompts.text: India's preventive-health market is growing 35% YoY — and we're just starting

hinge_prompts.label: TOGETHER WE COULD
hinge_prompts.text: Build the GLP-1 companion layer — coaching, habit support, off-ramp

hinge_prompts.label: MY CONTROVERSIAL TAKE
hinge_prompts.text: Wellness is a luxury category. The next trillion is in medicalization of lifestyle

hinge_prompts.label: I'LL WIN YOU OVER
hinge_prompts.text: When the first remote-first GP practice crosses $100M — which is happening in the next 18 months

health_wellness.user_behavior_shift: Indians under 35 now treat health as a subscription — they'd rather pay monthly than visit a hospital.
health_wellness.impact_potential: Preventive-care subscriptions unlock 5x LTV vs episodic care. Insurance-adjacent plays hit $50M ARR quickly.
health_wellness.india_scene: Ayushman Bharat covers 500M+. Health-tech layered on government rails is a wedge, not a niche.

subcategory_shares.name: Longevity & peptides
subcategory_shares.description: Biomarkers, supplements, protocols. Bryan Johnson wave.

subcategory_shares.name: Mental health
subcategory_shares.description: Therapy, AI coaches, mood tracking. Still underpenetrated.

subcategory_shares.name: Fitness tech
subcategory_shares.description: Smart strength, recovery, wearables. Beyond cardio.

creator_media.tagline: Attention is the only scarce resource left
creator_media.ai_disruption_angle: Gen AI collapsed production cost to zero. The moat moved to taste, distribution, and unique POV. Editors who curate beat creators who generate.
creator_media.cultural_trend: India's creator economy is minting more millionaires per capita than Silicon Valley per year
creator_media.recent_headline: Indian short-form creator Kusha Kapila signs $30M multi-platform deal, redefining talent economics
creator_media.investor_sentiment_short: Creator SaaS ARR grew 48% in 2025. Tools that help creators monetize 10x'd.

hinge_prompts.label: MY BIGGEST FLEX
hinge_prompts.text: A 21-year-old in Bangalore can now outearn a VP at Goldman

hinge_prompts.label: GREEN FLAG
hinge_prompts.text: You've published something — anything — publicly in the last week

hinge_prompts.label: LOOKING FOR
hinge_prompts.text: Taste. Specific opinions. A POV that makes people angry or obsessed

hinge_prompts.label: HONEST TRUTH
hinge_prompts.text: 99% of creator tools are commodified. The winners sell monetization, not creation

hinge_prompts.label: FUN FACT
hinge_prompts.text: India's short-form watch time exceeded the US in 2025 — on 6x the population

hinge_prompts.label: TOGETHER WE COULD
hinge_prompts.text: Build the agent infrastructure for the next 10,000 Indian creators to go pro

hinge_prompts.label: MY CONTROVERSIAL TAKE
hinge_prompts.text: YouTube is the best venture-backable business to compete with. Shorts is already over.

hinge_prompts.label: I'LL WIN YOU OVER
hinge_prompts.text: When you see a solo creator's P&L — 70%+ margin, $500K ARR, 4-person team

creator_media.user_behavior_shift: Creators expect tools that live inside their workflow — not another dashboard. Monetization = messaging + payments in one pane.
creator_media.impact_potential: Creator SaaS hits $100M ARR with 50K paying creators. 90% gross margins, network effects compound.
creator_media.india_scene: India has 80M+ creators and only ~0.3% monetize. The tooling gap is the opportunity.

subcategory_shares.name: Creator tools
subcategory_shares.description: Editing, automation, monetization SaaS for the 200M creators.

subcategory_shares.name: Short-form video
subcategory_shares.description: Shorts/Reels/TikTok native ad tech and platforms.

subcategory_shares.name: Podcasts
subcategory_shares.description: Discovery, monetization, hosting. Joe Rogan economy.

finance_payments.ai_disruption_angle: Risk underwriting, fraud detection, compliance review — every backoffice function in finance is being reinvented with LLMs. The winners own the data lake.
finance_payments.cultural_trend: UPI normalised $3T+ in annual retail flows — stablecoins are next
finance_payments.recent_headline: RBI-backed CBDC pilot crosses 10M daily users, reshapes cross-border remittance pricing
finance_payments.investor_sentiment_short: Stablecoin infra raised $6B in 2025. B2B payments margin compression is accelerating.

hinge_prompts.label: MY BIGGEST FLEX
hinge_prompts.text: $340B market, and every company globally is now a potential fintech

hinge_prompts.label: GREEN FLAG
hinge_prompts.text: You can explain interchange economics in under 60 seconds

hinge_prompts.label: LOOKING FOR
hinge_prompts.text: Patience. Fintech is a 5-year grind before it's a 20-year moat

hinge_prompts.label: HONEST TRUTH
hinge_prompts.text: Regulation is brutal. If you can't talk to a bank CCO, you won't survive month 6

hinge_prompts.label: FUN FACT
hinge_prompts.text: UPI processes more transactions in a day than Visa did in a year in 2014

hinge_prompts.label: TOGETHER WE COULD
hinge_prompts.text: Build the stablecoin rails for Indian SMBs doing cross-border — a $200B underserved market

hinge_prompts.label: MY CONTROVERSIAL TAKE
hinge_prompts.text: B2C fintech is over. B2B-embedded is where the next decade of margin lives

hinge_prompts.label: I'LL WIN YOU OVER
hinge_prompts.text: When you see what CAC/LTV looks like in embedded finance vs standalone — 10x better

finance_payments.user_behavior_shift: UPI normalized zero-friction payments. Users now expect rent, SIPs, and insurance to feel like Zepto checkout.
finance_payments.impact_potential: Embedded finance takes 30-50bps on billions in GMV. Infra plays hit $100M+ ARR with 5% of the market.
finance_payments.india_scene: UPI processes 15B+ transactions/month. India is now the proving ground for the next wave of global fintech.

subcategory_shares.name: Payments infra
subcategory_shares.description: Stripe-level rails for emerging markets and verticals.

education_learning.tagline: The BYJU's collapse left a clean field
education_learning.ai_disruption_angle: AI tutors deliver real-time Socratic questioning — the teaching technique that produces 2x retention — at zero marginal cost. The moat is outcomes proof, not content.
education_learning.cultural_trend: Post-BYJU's, Indian parents trust outcome-backed edtech over celebrity-backed edtech
education_learning.recent_headline: Khan Academy's Khanmigo crosses 10M students worldwide, India state partnerships accelerating
education_learning.investor_sentiment_short: Edtech funding rebounded 40% in 2025 after the 2023-24 trough. AI-tutor category leads.

hinge_prompts.label: MY BIGGEST FLEX
hinge_prompts.text: 1.4 billion people in India alone. And trust in the old guard is gone.

hinge_prompts.label: GREEN FLAG
hinge_prompts.text: You've taught someone something and documented the outcome

hinge_prompts.label: LOOKING FOR
hinge_prompts.text: Founders obsessed with learning outcomes, not learning time

hinge_prompts.label: HONEST TRUTH
hinge_prompts.text: Content is a commodity. Assessment, feedback loops, and habit are the moat

hinge_prompts.label: FUN FACT
hinge_prompts.text: The post-BYJU's trust gap is a competitive opportunity. Quality-first wins fast now.

hinge_prompts.label: TOGETHER WE COULD
hinge_prompts.text: Build the next-gen K-12 platform where every student has a Socratic tutor

hinge_prompts.label: MY CONTROVERSIAL TAKE
hinge_prompts.text: Degrees are becoming signaling-only. Actual skill verification is the real market

hinge_prompts.label: I'LL WIN YOU OVER
hinge_prompts.text: When you see a student's scores jump from an AI tutor — then you see the retention LTV

education_learning.user_behavior_shift: Students expect a Socratic tutor 24/7. YouTube + Claude has replaced the coaching class for ambitious Tier-2 kids.
education_learning.impact_potential: B2C edtech margins are thin — but B2B-to-schools + upskilling routes clear ₹500Cr+ revenue profitably.
education_learning.india_scene: Post-BYJU's collapse the category is reforming. PhysicsWallah, Camp K12, Vedantu — all building for profitability now.

subcategory_shares.name: AI tutors
subcategory_shares.description: Personalized learning paths. Khan Academy style.

subcategory_shares.name: Cohort-based
subcategory_shares.description: Maven-style live cohort courses for professionals.

food_agriculture.tagline: Precision fermentation is the next semiconductor
food_agriculture.ai_disruption_angle: Satellite + computer vision + LLMs are collapsing farm advisory from bi-weekly visits to real-time. The winners build data loops from 100M smallholder farmers.
food_agriculture.cultural_trend: Protein-scarcity panic + lab-grown tech breakthroughs = the next Tesla moment
food_agriculture.recent_headline: Indian agritech 'DeHaat' crosses 2M farmers, announces precision-fermentation joint venture
food_agriculture.investor_sentiment_short: Agritech funding grew 35% in 2025. Alt-protein funding is selective but massive for winners.

hinge_prompts.label: MY BIGGEST FLEX
hinge_prompts.text: $148B market, 17% CAGR. Food security + climate = decade-long tailwind

hinge_prompts.label: GREEN FLAG
hinge_prompts.text: You've actually talked to a farmer in the last year

hinge_prompts.label: LOOKING FOR
hinge_prompts.text: Founders willing to work with unglamorous, offline distribution

hinge_prompts.label: HONEST TRUTH
hinge_prompts.text: Agri margins are thin. You win with scale density or with premium niches — nothing in between

hinge_prompts.label: FUN FACT
hinge_prompts.text: India has 100M+ smallholder farmers. The data play alone is a generational opportunity.

hinge_prompts.label: TOGETHER WE COULD
hinge_prompts.text: Build the agronomist-in-every-pocket for rural Bharat

hinge_prompts.label: MY CONTROVERSIAL TAKE
hinge_prompts.text: Lab-grown meat will be an Indian success story before an American one

hinge_prompts.label: I'LL WIN YOU OVER
hinge_prompts.text: When you see a farmer's yield double with ML-driven advisory — then you see the ARPU

food_agriculture.user_behavior_shift: Quick commerce reset expectations — users want groceries in 10 min and meals in 20. Ghost kitchens + D2C brands are the winners.
food_agriculture.impact_potential: Vertical farming + alt-protein can hit 20% gross margin at scale. D2C food brands hit ₹500Cr+ with sound unit economics.
food_agriculture.india_scene: India eats differently by state. Regional D2C brands (ID Fresh, Slurrp Farm) are beating pan-India plays.

subcategory_shares.name: Food service tech
subcategory_shares.description: Ghost kitchens, AI menus, POS systems.

subcategory_shares.name: AgTech
subcategory_shares.description: Drones, soil sensors, micro-lending for farmers.

subcategory_shares.name: D2C food
subcategory_shares.description: Clean labels, niche diets, specialty beverages.

climate_energy.tagline: The biggest capital reallocation in history is happening now
climate_energy.ai_disruption_angle: AI is compressing drug-discovery-style cycles for battery chemistry, solar efficiency, and grid balancing. The breakthrough is real-time optimisation of fragmented energy assets.
climate_energy.cultural_trend: Climate is no longer ideological — it's an insurance and infrastructure problem
climate_energy.recent_headline: India hits 500GW renewable target 5 years early, battery storage sector raises $3.2B in 2025
climate_energy.investor_sentiment_short: Climate funding hit $115B globally in 2025. Grid tech and battery chemistry are leading categories.

hinge_prompts.label: MY BIGGEST FLEX
hinge_prompts.text: $180B market. Largest capex cycle in human history. 30+ year tailwind.

hinge_prompts.label: GREEN FLAG
hinge_prompts.text: You can read a solar data sheet or battery spec and actually understand it

hinge_prompts.label: LOOKING FOR
hinge_prompts.text: Patient founders. Climate is hard tech — years before revenue, decades of moat

hinge_prompts.label: HONEST TRUTH
hinge_prompts.text: Policy dependency is real. Know the subsidies. Know the state politics. Or partner with someone who does.

hinge_prompts.label: FUN FACT
hinge_prompts.text: India installed 15GW of solar in 2024 alone — more than Germany's total grid

hinge_prompts.label: TOGETHER WE COULD
hinge_prompts.text: Build the software layer for India's distributed rooftop solar — it doesn't exist at scale yet

hinge_prompts.label: MY CONTROVERSIAL TAKE
hinge_prompts.text: Climate SaaS is more venture-scalable than hardware. The software eating the grid is the real story.

hinge_prompts.label: I'LL WIN YOU OVER
hinge_prompts.text: When you see the unit economics of a modern EV fleet manager — solar → battery → EV is one product now

climate_energy.user_behavior_shift: Corporates have hard net-zero deadlines. Procurement now buys carbon-tracked steel, cement, and logistics — the premium is tolerated.
climate_energy.impact_potential: Climate-tech deals in India hit $1B+ in 2025. Infra plays (green hydrogen, battery storage) unlock $10B+ TAM.
climate_energy.india_scene: India committed to 500GW renewables by 2030. The supply chain — EPC, materials, storage — is the wedge.

subcategory_shares.name: Solar & grid
subcategory_shares.description: Residential and utility-scale solar. India's boom.

subcategory_shares.name: Battery storage
subcategory_shares.description: Grid-scale and home batteries. LFP chemistry leads.

subcategory_shares.name: Carbon capture
subcategory_shares.description: Direct-air capture and industrial CCS. Still early.

gaming_entertainment.tagline: India's gaming audience just passed the US
gaming_entertainment.ai_disruption_angle: AI-generated NPC dialogue, procedural quests, and live voiceover are collapsing game-dev cost 10x. Indie studios can now ship AAA-feeling content with 5-person teams.
gaming_entertainment.cultural_trend: Krafton's India bet + domestic publisher rise = a new Valve-sized opportunity in Asia
gaming_entertainment.recent_headline: Indian gaming market hits $6B, Nazara crosses 500M MAU across the portfolio
gaming_entertainment.investor_sentiment_short: Gaming funding consolidated in 2025 around India-first publishers and AI-native tooling.

hinge_prompts.label: MY BIGGEST FLEX
hinge_prompts.text: $200B globally. 3.2B players. India is the fastest-growing market.

hinge_prompts.label: GREEN FLAG
hinge_prompts.text: You've actually shipped a game, even a small one. Or you love games obsessively.

hinge_prompts.label: LOOKING FOR
hinge_prompts.text: Founders who can code AND understand retention math

hinge_prompts.label: HONEST TRUTH
hinge_prompts.text: Hit-driven industry. Most studios fail. Live-service is the only consistently-monetisable model

hinge_prompts.label: FUN FACT
hinge_prompts.text: India has 568M gamers — more than the US population — and the market is 6B and growing

hinge_prompts.label: TOGETHER WE COULD
hinge_prompts.text: Build AI NPCs that players actually want to talk to — that changes the entire quest paradigm

hinge_prompts.label: MY CONTROVERSIAL TAKE
hinge_prompts.text: Real-money gaming is the most addictive monetisation ever invented. Regulate it or ride it.

hinge_prompts.label: I'LL WIN YOU OVER
hinge_prompts.text: When you see what a 5-person studio can ship with AI tools in 2026 — it feels illegal

gaming_entertainment.user_behavior_shift: Indian players now pay for gaming at scale — UPI micro-transactions flipped mobile gaming from free-to-play to sustainable monetization.
gaming_entertainment.impact_potential: Mobile gaming + fantasy caps at ₹10k Cr revenue. AAA mobile and original IP plays are the breakout routes.
gaming_entertainment.india_scene: 100M+ daily gamers in India. Real-money gaming got regulated, so skill gaming + entertainment is where the growth lives.

subcategory_shares.name: Mobile games
subcategory_shares.description: Hypercasual and midcore. India's #1 entertainment category.

subcategory_shares.name: Skill gaming
subcategory_shares.description: Dream11, MPL, Winzo. Fantasy and skill-based.

subcategory_shares.name: VR & AR
subcategory_shares.description: Vision Pro and Quest. Enterprise and gaming converge.

fashion_beauty.ai_disruption_angle: AI styling and virtual try-on are collapsing category-decision friction. The winners own the try-before-buy loop, not the product SKU.
fashion_beauty.cultural_trend: Indian GenZ spend on beauty grew 4x faster than apparel in 2025
fashion_beauty.recent_headline: Nykaa crosses $8B valuation as its in-house brands out-grow the platform
fashion_beauty.investor_sentiment_short: D2C beauty had its reset in 2024. Survivors are cleaner, more profitable, and capital-efficient.

hinge_prompts.label: MY BIGGEST FLEX
hinge_prompts.text: $165B market. 50% of GenZ spend. One viral moment can build a brand in 30 days.

hinge_prompts.label: GREEN FLAG
hinge_prompts.text: You've actually launched a product and gotten honest feedback from strangers

hinge_prompts.label: LOOKING FOR
hinge_prompts.text: Founders with taste. Brand is everything here — can't be bolted on later

hinge_prompts.label: HONEST TRUTH
hinge_prompts.text: D2C has been brutal since 2023. Survivors are profitable, slow-growing, and margin-obsessed

hinge_prompts.label: FUN FACT
hinge_prompts.text: Nykaa's private-label brands now out-earn the platform business

hinge_prompts.label: TOGETHER WE COULD
hinge_prompts.text: Build the AI stylist that actually works — recommend-to-purchase conversion is a $20B opportunity

hinge_prompts.label: MY CONTROVERSIAL TAKE
hinge_prompts.text: Quick commerce killed discovery in fashion. The next wave is assisted decision-making.

hinge_prompts.label: I'LL WIN YOU OVER
hinge_prompts.text: When you see the margin on a beauty brand done right — 70%+ gross, 30%+ net at scale

fashion_beauty.user_behavior_shift: Gen-Z shops on Instagram, not websites. Content is the storefront; DMs close the sale.
fashion_beauty.impact_potential: D2C beauty can hit ₹500Cr ARR in 4 years. Category king in any niche (clean, skinimalism) gets acquired at 10x revenue.
fashion_beauty.india_scene: India's beauty market doubled in 3 years. Foxtale, Pilgrim, Plum — all raced from zero to category leader post-2021.

subcategory_shares.name: D2C beauty
subcategory_shares.description: Nykaa / Foxtale model. Clean, aware, Instagram-first.

subcategory_shares.name: Premium Indian
subcategory_shares.description: Ethnic wear, fine jewelry. Luxury D2C.

sports_fitness.tagline: From niche to mainstream to infrastructure
sports_fitness.ai_disruption_angle: AI-powered form correction, adaptive programming, and real-time biomechanics coaching collapse the value of in-person trainers by 80%. The winner owns engagement data.
sports_fitness.cultural_trend: Running clubs are the new networking events — across every major Indian city
sports_fitness.recent_headline: Cult.fit achieves profitability at $450M ARR, expands into corporate wellness
sports_fitness.investor_sentiment_short: Fitness tech is thriving selectively. B2B wellness and connected hardware are strong categories.

hinge_prompts.label: MY BIGGEST FLEX
hinge_prompts.text: The health-is-the-new-wealth wave is actually a decade-long trend

hinge_prompts.label: GREEN FLAG
hinge_prompts.text: You have a training streak longer than 30 days and can talk about it specifically

hinge_prompts.label: LOOKING FOR
hinge_prompts.text: Founders with genuine obsession — lifestyle, not line-item

hinge_prompts.label: HONEST TRUTH
hinge_prompts.text: Retention is brutal. 80% of users churn in 90 days. The game is making habit cheap.

hinge_prompts.label: FUN FACT
hinge_prompts.text: India's connected-fitness market is 4x larger now than it was pre-pandemic

hinge_prompts.label: TOGETHER WE COULD
hinge_prompts.text: Build the corporate wellness platform that actually gets employees to move — none exist

hinge_prompts.label: MY CONTROVERSIAL TAKE
hinge_prompts.text: Wearable data is mostly noise. The winners build software that ignores 95% and acts on 5%

hinge_prompts.label: I'LL WIN YOU OVER
hinge_prompts.text: When you see the LTV of a corporate wellness contract — 5-year MSAs, $100/employee/mo

sports_fitness.user_behavior_shift: Fitness is now biometric — users want an Oura/Whoop equivalent, not a gym membership.
sports_fitness.impact_potential: Wearable + subscription stacks unlock $300+ ARPU. Corporate wellness is a sticky B2B wedge.
sports_fitness.india_scene: Cult.fit did the gym. Ultrahuman is doing the wearable. The next wave is Indian-built metabolic IP.

subcategory_shares.name: Connected fitness
subcategory_shares.description: Smart bikes, mirrors, strength. Peloton / Tonal.

subcategory_shares.name: Fantasy sports
subcategory_shares.description: Dream11 economy. Regulated, massive in India.

subcategory_shares.name: Wearables
subcategory_shares.description: Oura, Whoop, Apple Watch. Recovery + sleep.

community_social.tagline: The platforms broke. Communities are the fix.
community_social.ai_disruption_angle: AI is rebuilding moderation, matchmaking, and content filtering at 100x speed. The winners are small communities with big moats, not big networks with thin engagement.
community_social.cultural_trend: GenZ's loneliness crisis + platform fatigue + private Discord growth = seismic shift
community_social.recent_headline: Indian creator-led communities on Rigi and Circle platforms hit 30M paying members
community_social.investor_sentiment_short: Community tooling raised $2.1B in 2025. Professional niches outperform consumer plays.

hinge_prompts.label: MY BIGGEST FLEX
hinge_prompts.text: The loneliness epidemic is real. Every community I build is a health intervention.

hinge_prompts.label: GREEN FLAG
hinge_prompts.text: You've moderated a real community and understand what ruins one

hinge_prompts.label: LOOKING FOR
hinge_prompts.text: Founders with a specific tribe — not 'everyone,' one clear avatar

hinge_prompts.label: HONEST TRUTH
hinge_prompts.text: Networks die fast without active seeding. First 100 members is everything.

hinge_prompts.label: FUN FACT
hinge_prompts.text: Indian WhatsApp groups for professional interests are unmonetised — but have millions of members

hinge_prompts.label: TOGETHER WE COULD
hinge_prompts.text: Build the 'LinkedIn for [underserved profession in India]' — there are 50 of these.

hinge_prompts.label: MY CONTROVERSIAL TAKE
hinge_prompts.text: Consumer social is a VC trap. Vertical pro communities are where the real retention lives.

hinge_prompts.label: I'LL WIN YOU OVER
hinge_prompts.text: When you see a 50-member paid community generate more revenue than a 500K-member free one

community_social.user_behavior_shift: People are leaving big social networks for small paid communities — Discord, WhatsApp groups, Circle spaces.
community_social.impact_potential: Creator-led communities hit ₹10Cr+ ARR with 10K paying members. Platform fees 5-10% scale into $B+ category.
community_social.india_scene: Koo's pivot opened space. Rigi and Convosight proved paid communities work. India's online social spend is still tiny.

subcategory_shares.name: Dating
subcategory_shares.description: Bumble / Hinge economics. Vernacular apps rising.

real_estate_home.tagline: The last big industry still running on spreadsheets
real_estate_home.ai_disruption_angle: AI agents are replacing brokers for transactions under $500K in India. Full-stack ownership of listing → visit → close → finance is the winning model.
real_estate_home.cultural_trend: Gen-Z India is renting longer than any prior generation — rental-tech is finally investable
real_estate_home.recent_headline: NoBroker hits 100M registered users, announces IPO plans for 2027
real_estate_home.investor_sentiment_short: PropTech funding rebounded in 2025 after post-COVID correction. Mortgage and rental-tech leading.

hinge_prompts.label: MY BIGGEST FLEX
hinge_prompts.text: Every human needs shelter. Every transaction runs on fax machines. Huge.

hinge_prompts.label: GREEN FLAG
hinge_prompts.text: You've actually bought or rented something and survived the process

hinge_prompts.label: LOOKING FOR
hinge_prompts.text: Founders who can navigate offline-heavy stakeholders (brokers, builders, banks)

hinge_prompts.label: HONEST TRUTH
hinge_prompts.text: Cycle-sensitive. Rates matter more than features. Know the macro or lose money.

hinge_prompts.label: FUN FACT
hinge_prompts.text: India's real-estate market is $270B and still mostly run on broker phone networks

hinge_prompts.label: TOGETHER WE COULD
hinge_prompts.text: Build the mortgage underwriting agent — banks want to outsource it, regulators are ready

hinge_prompts.label: MY CONTROVERSIAL TAKE
hinge_prompts.text: iBuying is a capital-heavy zombie. The real winner is rental-tech — asset-light, recurring

hinge_prompts.label: I'LL WIN YOU OVER
hinge_prompts.text: When you see the take-rate on a full-stack rental ops platform — fee, deposit, utility, furniture

real_estate_home.user_behavior_shift: Buyers research entirely online before a site visit. Virtual tours, drone videos, financing calculators — all expected before first contact.
real_estate_home.impact_potential: Proptech in India caps around $5B revenue, but interiors, financing, and rentals each crack $500M+ revenue plays.
real_estate_home.india_scene: NoBroker IPO pipeline + Square Yards growth shows proptech can profit. The unlock is transaction enablement, not listings.

subcategory_shares.name: Property mgmt
subcategory_shares.description: Landlord / tenant SaaS. Rent, maintenance, compliance.

subcategory_shares.name: Co-living
subcategory_shares.description: Stanza Living, Zolo. Managed premium rentals.

subcategory_shares.name: Smart home
subcategory_shares.description: IoT, security, automation. Aqara / Matter ecosystems.

logistics_mobility.ai_disruption_angle: AI routing, autonomous last-mile, and real-time warehouse robotics are collapsing delivery cost per km by 40%. The winners aren't asset-heavy — they're data-heavy.
logistics_mobility.cultural_trend: Quick commerce (10-min delivery) is becoming the default expectation in urban India
logistics_mobility.recent_headline: Zepto quietly achieves contribution profitability, plans $6B IPO for FY27
logistics_mobility.investor_sentiment_short: Logistics funding is selectively strong. Quick commerce, autonomous, and EV fleet are top categories.

hinge_prompts.label: MY BIGGEST FLEX
hinge_prompts.text: Every e-commerce order. Every restaurant delivery. Every supply chain. I'm the infrastructure.

hinge_prompts.label: GREEN FLAG
hinge_prompts.text: You're comfortable with operations — real operations, not PowerPoint operations

hinge_prompts.label: LOOKING FOR
hinge_prompts.text: Founders who love unit economics and have patience for unsexy optimisation wins

hinge_prompts.label: HONEST TRUTH
hinge_prompts.text: Capex-heavy. Margins are thin until density kicks in. Geography matters more than tech

hinge_prompts.label: FUN FACT
hinge_prompts.text: Indian quick commerce hit $10B GMV in 2025 — 3 years after launch

hinge_prompts.label: TOGETHER WE COULD
hinge_prompts.text: Build the autonomous yard operations layer — the moat is in last-100-meters, not last-mile

hinge_prompts.label: MY CONTROVERSIAL TAKE
hinge_prompts.text: Autonomous trucks arrive before autonomous cars. Highway miles are the easier problem.

hinge_prompts.label: I'LL WIN YOU OVER
hinge_prompts.text: When you see the unit economics of a dark store at 10-min-density — 30%+ contribution margin

logistics_mobility.user_behavior_shift: 10-min delivery reset the ceiling. Anything over 30 min feels slow. Intercity and B2B logistics are next.
logistics_mobility.impact_potential: Logistics in India is a $200B market. EV + quick commerce + B2B freight each unlock $1B+ revenue plays.
logistics_mobility.india_scene: Zepto, Porter, Delhivery — three models all scaling. Logistics is India's biggest inefficiency and biggest startup category.

legal_compliance.ai_disruption_angle: Legal research, contract review, and regulatory compliance are the most clearly-automatable white-collar functions. The winners build workflows, not just models — lawyers buy outcomes, not AI.
legal_compliance.cultural_trend: Legaltech went from laughingstock to unicorn factory in 18 months — Harvey alone raised $300M
legal_compliance.recent_headline: Harvey crosses $200M ARR with Big Law partnerships covering 30+ of top 50 firms
legal_compliance.investor_sentiment_short: Legaltech is one of the hottest 2025 categories. AI moats are clearer than in most verticals.

hinge_prompts.label: MY BIGGEST FLEX
hinge_prompts.text: A $1T global legal industry that still runs on Word documents and billable hours

hinge_prompts.label: GREEN FLAG
hinge_prompts.text: You've actually read a contract end-to-end in the last year

hinge_prompts.label: LOOKING FOR
hinge_prompts.text: Founders who can sell to lawyers — slow, reference-driven, pilot-heavy

hinge_prompts.label: HONEST TRUTH
hinge_prompts.text: Selling to Big Law is slow. The real early traction is in-house counsel at mid-market

hinge_prompts.label: FUN FACT
hinge_prompts.text: India spends $6B on legal services annually — almost all of it untouched by AI

hinge_prompts.label: TOGETHER WE COULD
hinge_prompts.text: Build the GST/labour compliance autopilot for Indian SMBs — 60M businesses need it

hinge_prompts.label: MY CONTROVERSIAL TAKE
hinge_prompts.text: Lawyers will demand AI tools faster than any other profession — billable hour pressure forces it

hinge_prompts.label: I'LL WIN YOU OVER
hinge_prompts.text: When you see how fast Harvey went from 0 to $200M ARR — the category is on fire

legal_compliance.user_behavior_shift: SMB owners now expect AI-generated compliance docs in seconds. GST filings, ESI, contracts — all instant.
legal_compliance.impact_potential: GST + labour-compliance SaaS hits ₹100Cr ARR with 50K SMBs. Legal AI (contracts) unlocks $100M+ for tooling.
legal_compliance.india_scene: India has 60M SMBs with manual compliance. SpotDraft + Cleartax proved the model; next wave is vertical AI per workflow.

hardware_robotics.tagline: Atoms are getting their AI moment
hardware_robotics.ai_disruption_angle: Foundation-model robotics is finally here. General-purpose arms, humanoids, and warehouse robots are moving from demos to deployments. The winners own specific use cases, not the platform.
hardware_robotics.cultural_trend: Manufacturing is coming home — US and India reshoring simultaneously for the first time since 1990
hardware_robotics.recent_headline: Figure AI's BMW deployment scales to 3 plants, Indian automotive OEMs announce humanoid pilots
hardware_robotics.investor_sentiment_short: Robotics funding exploded to $14B in 2025. Humanoid, warehouse, and drone are leading.

hinge_prompts.label: MY BIGGEST FLEX
hinge_prompts.text: Robots are the next iPhone moment. Foundation models for atoms finally work.

hinge_prompts.label: GREEN FLAG
hinge_prompts.text: You've actually built hardware — real or hobby. You respect the BOM.

hinge_prompts.label: LOOKING FOR
hinge_prompts.text: Patient founders with engineering depth. No-code hardware doesn't exist.

hinge_prompts.label: HONEST TRUTH
hinge_prompts.text: Hardware is brutal. Cycle times are years. You need capital, patience, and zero romance.

hinge_prompts.label: FUN FACT
hinge_prompts.text: Indian defence drones are now a $2B export category — started at $50M in 2021

hinge_prompts.label: TOGETHER WE COULD
hinge_prompts.text: Build the robotic inspection layer for Indian manufacturing — all currently manual

hinge_prompts.label: MY CONTROVERSIAL TAKE
hinge_prompts.text: Humanoids are a science project. Vertical-specific robots (warehouse, agri) will make money first

hinge_prompts.label: I'LL WIN YOU OVER
hinge_prompts.text: When you see a single warehouse robot amortise in 14 months — the ROI is obvious

hardware_robotics.user_behavior_shift: Factories are automating aggressively post-2023 labour shortages. Robotic arms and drones aren't sci-fi for mid-market manufacturers anymore.
hardware_robotics.impact_potential: Hardware has tougher capex, but category leaders (ideaForge, Pristine) unlock ₹500Cr+ via government + export contracts.
hardware_robotics.india_scene: Make-in-India + PLI subsidies shifted the math. Indian hardware unicorns are finally viable — ideaForge IPO proved the category.

subcategory_shares.name: Robotics SaaS
subcategory_shares.description: Software for physical robots. ROS ecosystem.
